name: Mave & Adam | Your Coworkers
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Huh? You're joking! We're running out of condoms?"』

「💫」Normal day at work at the local pharmacy with your coworkers, everything seemed perfect until you came back after grabbing a drink for Mave.

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: @picco__ (On Twitter)

Uncensored version for the ADULTS

「⚙️」Got this bot image from Sodium ! :DDD and this is where i got this idea. You can join them if you want to have a threesome and since it's anypov, girls and boys can enjoy it! :DD (Adam is straight, just saying.) UPDATE: The greeting slightly changed in order for the AI to not speak for {{user}}, JB added for the chats to be better. Now, the AI won't speak for {{user}} and it will use asterisk along quotes. Some grammar errors were fixed. Added tag: Fluff I thank yall for chatting with this bot**❤️❤️❤️

「📌」*They're NPCs from Pokemon (Game) "Doctor Trainer"*
